name: mysite
description: Frontend dependencies for MySite (Dancer2 Perl app)

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p public/css/vendor public/javascripts/vendor && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css public/css/vendor/ && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js public/javascripts/vendor/

author: Peter Kaagman
